banner.subheadline: Fully equipped designer apartments in prime locations — better than a hotel, more personal than Airbnb.

companyStandards.label: Our Promise
companyStandards.subtitle: Every stay meets our high standards — so you can simply arrive and enjoy.

wifi.title: Fast Wi-Fi Access
wifi.description: Ideal for streaming, video calls and multiple simultaneous connections.

checkin.title: Self Check-In at Any Hour
checkin.description: A unique code for your stay — flexible arrival, no waiting.

accessible.title: Accessible Entrance
accessible.description: Dresden: street-level directly from the road. Berlin: just two small steps.

design.title: Lovingly Designed Apartments
design.description: Cozy is in our DNA — beautiful, functional and unforgettable.

bedding.title: Bed Linen & Towels
bedding.description: Bed linen, towels, bath towels and kitchen towels included.

cleaning.title: Deep Cleaning — Every Time
cleaning.description: Impeccable cleanliness for every stay. Our reviews speak for themselves.

gallery.label: Our Properties
gallery.subtitle: With a blend of functionality and design, we've furnished our apartments so you can enjoy an unforgettable stay.

testimonials.label: Our Guests
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from guests around the world — in Berlin and Dresden.
